column4: SA Water operational region where the water supply system is located.
Name of the water supply system.
Unit used to report the parameter value.
ADWG health-based guideline value where applicable. "NG" indicates no guideline value.
ADWG aesthetic guideline value related to taste, appearance, or odour. "NG" indicates no guideline value.
Rolling 12-month average measurement value reported by SA Water. Derived by removing "<" symbols from the original text field and converting values to numeric format.
Percentage compliance with health guideline values where reported.
Primary disinfection method used by the water supply system.

Approximate SA Water operational region created from grouped government regions. Derived from a manually created correspondence table linking South Australian Government regions to SA Water operational regions.

Spatial polygon representing the operational region boundary for mapping and spatial analysis. Derived by aggregating South Australian Government regional boundaries according to the correspondence table.
